  • [ - ] Zoltan - member since 15-Feb-20

    Old school football (showing big heart throughout the game, shooting from a distance) won against modern football (soulless attitude towards the game, mostly relying on centering the ball against a parked bus, which is utter nonsense). The key to Argentina's loss was the incompetency of Scaloni: here is how a more offensive lineup would have looked - Julian Alvarez, L. Martinez, Angel Correa - Messi, Enzo Fernandez, Dybala - Paredes - Tagliafico, Otamendi, Acuna - Martinez. This lineup contains ONLY 5 defensively minded players as opposed to Scaloni's 7 - an enormous difference. Not to mention the fact that Scaloni should have known that Di Maria and Gomez are out of form!
